message:
Optimize supervisor restart-budget kernel with VecDeque and reference-model testing

Replace Vec<u64> restart timestamp storage with VecDeque for O(1) front
eviction during sliding-window pruning. Introduce RestartWindowView to
avoid allocating a filtered Vec on every health_status() call. Split
health reporting into a pure health_status() query and an explicit
record_health_report() that emits SUP-008 events.

Add a reference restart-budget kernel oracle with exhaustive schedule
enumeration and adversarial burst schedules for differential testing.
Include a syn-based source regression test that prevents synthetic time
stubs from being reintroduced. Add benchmark stubs for comparing
VecDeque vs Vec kernels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
